feed.title: MSFS Blog
feed.subtitle: Development updates of Microsoft Flight Simulator.

entry.title: Developer Highlight: Taog’s Hangar and the UH-1H Huey
entry.summary: Few aircraft in aviation history are as instantly recognizable as the Bell UH-1H Huey. In Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024, this legendary helicopter is now taking to the skies in partnership with Taog’s Hangar, a developer known for high-fidelity, community-driven rotorcraft. Download the Stranger Things Expansion for FREE and fly the Huey through its dedicated missions … Continued

entry.title: Creator Highlight, January 2026 – CowTown
entry.summary: We’re continuing our Creator Highlight series in 2026 and are starting the new year in style, featuring popular YouTuber CowTown! Having started content creation a decade ago, CowTown (Tim) has switched his focus to Microsoft Flight Simulator in recent years. Sitting at just shy of 50’000 subscribers, Tim’s passion for our community shines through in … Continued

entry.title: Creator Highlight, February 2026 – FlyWithLado
entry.summary: For our February Creator Highlight, we’re focusing on popular video creator FlyWithLado! Having amassed a ginormous following of over 540,000 Instagram users and many more on different platforms, FlyWithLado is redefining content creation for social media in our community.We asked them some questions to give you all a behind the scenes look at their content:Do … Continued

entry.title: May 28th, 2026 MSFS Weekly Briefing
entry.summary: Weekly RecapThe Sim Update 5.1 beta remains ongoing, and the team is very carefully reviewing all the player feedback and bug reports, the results of our forum surveys, and automatic telemetry data from beta testers as they work to improve stability and resolve low memory and avionics issues encountered by players in SU5, particularly among … Continued

entry.title: Aircraft & Avionics Update 04 and Microsoft Creator Sale
entry.summary: Microsoft Flight Simulator is pleased to announce the release of Aircraft & Avionics Update 04. This highly-anticipated update brings MSFS 2024-native versions of five popular aircraft from European manufacturers: Antonov An-2 ATR 42-600/72-600 (PC/XBOX available now, PS5 coming soon) Fokker F.VII Latécoère 631 Savoia-Marchetti S.55/S55x To coincide with the release of AAU_04, we are also … Continued

entry.title: Carenado Creator Sale
entry.summary: Carenado’s top 6 planes are now 30% off! We are excited to announce the Carenado Creator Sale on the MSFS 2024 Marketplace for PC and Xbox! From now until June 11th @ 10 AM Pacific (1700 UTC), save 30% off these Carenado products: B390 B55 C172 C182Q CT210N F33A To purchase these discounted items, visit … Continued

entry.title: June 4th, 2026 MSFS Weekly Briefing
entry.summary: Weekly RecapThe ongoing public pre-release test for Sim Update 5.1 continues with a new build (1.7.30.0) released last week to those enrolled in the optional beta. You can read the release notes for this build here. We once again kindly ask everyone participating in the public beta test to vote in our surveys and share your … Continued

entry.title: Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024 | World Update 22 Announce – XBOX Games Showcase 2026
entry.summary: Microsoft Flight Simulator celebrates gorgeous United States of America landscapes in this spectacular World Update 22: US National Parks. Featuring over thirty National Parks and Monuments and the Goodyear Blimp- Coming July 4th, 2026!Want to experience the thrills and adventure of air racing? Coming this fall, take to the skies over New Mexico with the … Continued

entry.title: May 21st, 2026 MSFS Weekly Briefing
entry.summary: Weekly RecapPublic testing of the ongoing Sim Update 5.1 Beta continues. This test build is specifically targeted to address player concerns about stability, low memory warnings, and avionics issues, particularly on consoles. In case you missed it, you can read the full release notes for test build 1.7.28.0 here. If you would like to join … Continued

This highly-anticipated update brings MSFS 2024-native versions of five popular aircraft from European manufacturers: Antonov An-2 ATR 42-600/72-600 (PC/XBOX available now, PS5 coming soon) Fokker F.VII Latécoère 631 Savoia-Marchetti S.55/S55x To coincide with the release of AAU_04, we are also … Continued

entry.title: Microsoft Flight Simulator Releases Its Next Beautiful World Update 21: Australia
entry.summary: Available today, World Update 21: Australia sets a new standard in realism for pilots in the Microsoft Flight Simulator world!Australia is home to some of the world’s most spectacular sights and destinations, including stunning coastlines, vast deserts, beautiful mountains, and architectural marvels. Renowned attractions include the Sydney Opera House, one of the most distinctive structures … Continued

entry.title: Microsoft Flight Simulator Releases Local Legend 24: The CAC Boomerang
entry.summary: The legendary Boomerang is the only fighter aircraft designed and manufactured in its entirety in AustraliaAnswering the Call of WarThe Boomerang is a single-seat, single-engine, multi-role fighter developed and manufactured by the Commonwealth Aircraft Corporation (CAC) of Australia. CAC began developing the Boomerang to fulfill Australia’s urgent need for a combat aircraft following the outbreak … Continued
